body.title: CLOSED: Wire bliss_integrator, experiment_outcome, sensor_tree into callers
body.description:
Three built-but-not-wired cognition modules have clear call sites identified. Wire each per its own docstring entry point:
- bliss_integrator.py: called from milieu.py on Pursuit completion events (milieu.py already references it in its docstring)
- experiment_outcome.py: called from experiment_scheduler.py (which already references the 'experiment_outcome' type in its deposits)
- sensor_tree.py: called from palace_metric.py monitoring path (palace_metric.py docstring names it as complement)

For each: import the module, find the exact call site, wire it in, verify no behavior regression.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/milieu.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/experiment_scheduler.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/palace_metric.py
**Design rules:** oop-first. docs-in-code: update Updated timestamp in each touched file.
**Scope boundary:** IN: add import + call for each of the three modules at the identified call site. OUT: modifying the modules themselves, wiring goal_formation (T-goal-formation-from-conversation), wiring graph_integrator/preparse_router (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** Run full test suite after each wiring. Verify no new exceptions in pe_chain.log after Igor restart.
